implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0

completion_promises.evidence: Created installer/core/commands/lib/task_status_json.py with main() function and proper __name__ == '__main__' guard

completion_promises.criterion_text: Scans `tasks/backlog/`, `tasks/in_progress/`, `tasks/in_review/`, `tasks/blocked/`, `tasks/completed/` recursively (including feature subfolders like `tasks/backlog/{feature-slug}/` and archive folders like `tasks/completed/YYYY-MM/`)

completion_promises.criterion_text: Parses frontmatter via `task_utils.parse_task_frontmatter` (no duplicate YAML-parsing logic)

completion_promises.criterion_text: Emits schema v1 JSON to stdout with fixed key order and tasks sorted by `(status, id)`
